projectDescription: Pressmaster is an AI-powered content creation platform that transforms your expertise into articles, social media posts, and press releases — distributed across your channels and major publications.
keyFeatures: AI Agent-Team (Supernova) for autonomous content planning and creation
Content Twin — a personalized AI model trained on your thinking patterns
TrendMaster — real-time trend discovery across 500,000+ daily sources
Article, social media post, and press release creation
One-click publishing to LinkedIn, Twitter/X, Instagram, Facebook, and Bluesky
Press release distribution to 400+ publications including Business Insider and Yahoo Finance
Newsroom builder with custom domain support
Blog integrations for WordPress, Webflow, Wix, Ghost, and Blogger
Mobile app for capturing ideas on the go
publicApiSurface: Supernova Agent-Team (Repurpose & Series / Plan & Create modes)
Social media post creation and scheduling
Newsroom builder with custom domain and SEO settings
Integrations: WordPress.org, WordPress.com, Webflow, Wix, Ghost, Blogger
Social channel connections: LinkedIn, Twitter/X, Instagram, Facebook, Bluesky
White-label settings: logo, favicon, banner, subdomain
